nodes.name: header-subtitle
nodes.text: // Single endpoint for all MCP communication with session management over HTTP transport.

nodes.name: module-prose
nodes.text:
Sessions expire after 30 minutes of inactivity.
A background timer checks every 60 seconds and cleans up expired sessions.

nodes.name: fn1-body
nodes.text:
Read the Mcp-Session-Id header from the request.
  Route by HTTP method: POST, GET, DELETE.
  Any other method returns 405.

nodes.name: fn2-body
nodes.text:
1. Resolve the session:
     IF sessionId provided and session exists, reuse it and update last activity.
     IF sessionId provided but session is gone, auto-reconnect.
     IF no sessionId, create a brand new session.
  2. Detect blocking render_ui calls...
  3. Forward to transport.

nodes.name: popover-desc
nodes.text:
Shared MCP server configuration used by both
stdio and HTTP transports.
